blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Verify that customers are promoted from the waitlist when capacity opens.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Promotion from waitlist when capacity opens', but the evidence does not confirm that the system successfully promotes customers from the waitlist when additional capacity becomes available. While the linked use case describes a scenario where waitlisted customers are auto-promoted, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that demonstrates this functionality was executed or validated. This indicates a gap in the validation process, as the necessary checks for this requirement were not performed.
gaps: No evidence confirming that customers on the waitlist were promoted when additional capacity was confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for waitlist promotion
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that customers are promoted from the waitlist when capacity opens.
